name: sidebar-group
visual_summary: The Sidebar Group component is a container within the sidebar that groups related items together. It typically includes a title and a list of items. It is commonly used when displaying a hierarchical structure of menu items or filtering options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-group
Description: The Sidebar Group component is a container within the sidebar that groups related items together. It typically includes a title and a list of items. It is commonly used when displaying a hierarchical structure of menu items or filtering options.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: e.g. animated, expandable, collapsible
Tags: sidebar, menu, grouping

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
